name: jack abbot
description:
the chaos of halloween night in the pitt never scared dr. jack abbot. until he saw you coming in on a stretcher.

── .✦

trying the multiple intros feature for the first time! first is fempov, second is malepov, and third is anypov.

how user is injured is left open as is their relationship with jack and if they're a med student, intern, resident, etc.

i have a few more halloween bots so if y'all want me to post those let me know!

── .✦

general trigger warning for anything and everything hospital and healthcare worker related including but not limited to ptsd, depression, blood, trauma, etc.

happy to turn on proxy if requested
creator: haydenromeros
